hooks.command: bash -c ': ctxr-memory-hook-v1; DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; HOOK="$DIR/.memory/src/scripts/hooks/session-start.sh"; [ -x "$HOOK" ] && exec "$HOOK" || { mkdir -p "$DIR/.memory/src" 2>/dev/null; printf "%s hook-launcher: missing %s (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s)\n" "$(date -u +%FT%T)" "$HOOK" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<unset>}" >>"$DIR/.memory/src/.hook-launcher.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; }'

bash -c ': ctxr-memory-hook-v1; DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; HOOK="$DIR/.memory/src/scripts/hooks/pre-compact.sh"; [ -x "$HOOK" ] && exec "$HOOK" || { mkdir -p "$DIR/.memory/src" 2>/dev/null; printf "%s hook-launcher: missing %s (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s)\n" "$(date -u +%FT%T)" "$HOOK" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<unset>}" >>"$DIR/.memory/src/.hook-launcher.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; }'

bash -c ': ctxr-memory-hook-v1; DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; HOOK="$DIR/.memory/src/scripts/hooks/post-compact.sh"; [ -x "$HOOK" ] && exec "$HOOK" || { mkdir -p "$DIR/.memory/src" 2>/dev/null; printf "%s hook-launcher: missing %s (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s)\n" "$(date -u +%FT%T)" "$HOOK" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<unset>}" >>"$DIR/.memory/src/.hook-launcher.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; }'

bash -c ': ctxr-memory-hook-v1; DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; HOOK="$DIR/.memory/src/scripts/hooks/session-end.sh"; [ -x "$HOOK" ] && exec "$HOOK" || { mkdir -p "$DIR/.memory/src" 2>/dev/null; printf "%s hook-launcher: missing %s (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s)\n" "$(date -u +%FT%T)" "$HOOK" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<unset>}" >>"$DIR/.memory/src/.hook-launcher.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; }'

bash -c ': ctxr-memory-hook-v1; DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; HOOK="$DIR/.memory/src/scripts/hooks/exit-plan-mode.sh"; [ -x "$HOOK" ] && exec "$HOOK" || { mkdir -p "$DIR/.memory/src" 2>/dev/null; printf "%s hook-launcher: missing %s (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s)\n" "$(date -u +%FT%T)" "$HOOK" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<unset>}" >>"$DIR/.memory/src/.hook-launcher.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; }'
